note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: Transforms Allcure Elixir into Mass Allcure Elixir.Mass Allcure ElixirRemoves all poison, disease and curse effects from party and raid members within 30 yds, and grants immunity to such effects for 3 seconds.

Amphibimorph.baseDescription:
Transform enemies at target location into a frog, making them unable to attack or cast spells, and slowing their movement speed by -25% for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). While transformed into a frog the enemy is considered a Beast.

Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Amphibimorph is now instant cast.
Reduces the cooldown of Amphibimorph by -60 sec, but increases its cast time by 0.5 sec.

Arcane Brew.baseDescription:
Throw your Arcane Brew at an ally, increasing their spell power and Spirit by 30 for 10 seconds.

Spell power scales with caster level.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cast time of Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju by -0.3 sec.
Increases the damage of Bad Juju, Malefic Wrath and Hexfire by 20% against enemies affected by Hex of Malice.

Transform into a malignant spirit for 30 seconds, allowing you to cast Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju while moving, and periodically granting you a Spirit every 2 sec.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Level 30 Passive
Damage dealt by your Shadow Puppets and Puppeteer's Threads now has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Bad Juju and cause your next cast to incur an -8 sec reduced cooldown.
Increases the spell power scaling of Malefic Wrath, Shadowflare, and Bad Juju by 20%.
When Bad Juju is used on enemies affected by Puppeteer's Threads, it strikes an additional time every 1 sec for 30% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds as Nature damage.
Damage dealt by Bad Juju and Hexfire now spreads Hex of Malice to up to 1 nearby enemy.

Level 40 Passive
Increases your spell critical damage by 100% and increases the critical strike chance of Bad Juju by 5% for each active Spirit on you.
Your Mimic Wards now also cast Bad Juju and casting Bad Juju now reduces the cooldown of Shadow Puppets by -3 sec.

Your Bad Juju and Hexfire now strike 2 additional nearby enemies.

Shadowflare now deals 50% increased damage to enemies affected by Puppeteer's Threads.Puppeteer’s Threads (Debuff)Damage taken from the Witch Doctor stores 10% of its value. When the effect ends the damage stored is dealt instantly.

Infuse your Cauldron with Beast Blood for 10 seconds, causing 15% of the direct Physical damage taken by allies within 40 yds to instead be dealt over time.

Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

Infuse your Cauldron with Crystal Water for 10 seconds, causing allies within 40 yds to be shielded for 20% of their healing taken for 5 seconds.

Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

Infuse your Cauldron with Beast Blood for 10 seconds, causing 15% of the direct Physical damage taken by allies within 40 yds to instead be dealt over time.

Only 1 Base can be active at a time.
Big Bad Voodoo now only reduces damage dealt by 25% and reduces damage taken by an additional -5%.

Brew Bloodthistle into your Cauldron.

Cauldron: Allies within 40 yds receive 8% increased healing.

Potion: Causes target ally to leech 5% of all damage they deal for 15 seconds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Jungle Thistle to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Bloodthistle.
Increases the cooldown of Call of Sseratus by 5 sec, but increases the amount of Serpent Wards summoned by it by 2.

Transforms Call of Sseratus into Viper Ward.Viper WardSummons a powerful and fast-attacking Viper Ward at target location for 20 seconds.

Viper Wards have a 50% chance to unleash a Hexfire Blast, dealing 216 + 15% ranged AP Fire damage to an enemy.

Chance increased based on your ranged critical strike rating.

Brew Jungle Shrooms into your Cauldron.

Cauldron: Heal up to 8 allies within 30 yds for 34 + 15% healing every 8 sec.

Potion Toss: Heal the target ally for -3.75 to -2.75 every 3 sec for 18 seconds.

Fill a potion from your Cauldron, and toss it at a friendly target, healing them for 108 + 40% healing + 10% Spirit.

The effect of Potion Toss will change based on your active Ingredients.

Level 10 Passive
You may now prepare Ingredients into a Cauldron, crafting a brew. 

Nearby allies are buffed based on the active brew.

Only 1 of each Ingredient can be active at a time.

Fill a splash potion from your Cauldron, and toss it at a location, healing up to 8 allies for 54 + 22.45% healing + 8% Spirit.

Potion effects from Ingredients used this way have reduced effectiveness.

Brew Frog Bones into your Cauldron.

Cauldron: Grants allies within 40 yds -3% reduced damage taken.

Potion: Grants target ally an absorption shield, absorbing 50 + 35% Spirit damage, scaling with Spirit.

Brew Bloodthistle into your Cauldron.

Cauldron: Allies within 40 yds receive 8% increased healing.

Potion: Causes target ally to leech 5% of all damage they deal for 15 seconds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.
Increases the healing of your Jungle Shrooms from your Cauldron by 30%.

Infuse your Cauldron with Spice: Earthbloom.

Increases effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients by 30%.

Infuse your Cauldron with Spice: Peacebloom.

Reduces the duration of roots, stuns, and snares against allies within 40 yds by -25%.
Jungle Shrooms used from your Cauldron now ticks -3 sec faster.

Infuse your Cauldron with Beast Blood for 10 seconds, causing 15% of the direct Physical damage taken by allies within 40 yds to instead be dealt over time.

Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

Infuse your Cauldron with Crystal Water for 10 seconds, causing allies within 40 yds to be shielded for 20% of their healing taken for 5 seconds.

Only 1 Base can be active at a time.
For 10 seconds, the effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients is increased by 100% and you can cast Spirit in a Bottle while moving.

Cleansing Idol.baseDescription:
Drop a Cleansing Idol near you for 1 minute.

Allies within 30 yds have 1 poison and disease effect removed from them every 3 sec.

modifyingTalents.description:
Infuse your Cauldron with Crystal Water for 10 seconds, causing allies within 40 yds to be shielded for 20% of their healing taken for 5 seconds.

Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

Cursed Effigy.baseDescription:
Drop a Cursed Effigy near you for 15 seconds.

Enemies within 15 yds are unable to critically strike.

Dark Mojo.baseDescription: Increases your chance to resist magic and curse effects by 20%.

Death Draught.baseDescription: Drink a potent voodoo draught that slows your body to a deathlike stillness for up to 5 minutes, causing you to feign death which may trick enemies into ignoring you.

Devotion to Bwonsamdi.baseDescription: Your direct damage now heals you for 10% of the damage done.

modifyingTalents.description: When you heal with Loa's Brew your Effigies will now heal an additional ally within 20 yds for 35% of the healing done, prioritizing allies with low health.
Reduces the mana cost of your Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -20%.
Reduces the cooldown of all Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -25%.

Eye of Kimbul.baseDescription:
Critical strikes now apply Eye of Kimbul to enemies for 15 seconds.Eye of KimbulIncreases damage dealt and critical strike chance against this target by 1%, stacking 5 times.

While affected, enemies cannot stealth or turn invisible.

modifyingTalents.description:
Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Fish Bones to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Fish Oil and Frog Bones.

Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Fish Bones to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Fish Oil and Frog Bones.

Fool's Play.baseDescription: Target an enemy and summon a copy of them for 20 seconds that attacks them and replicates their spells back on them.

modifyingTalents.description:
Brew Frog Bones into your Cauldron.

Cauldron: Grants allies within 40 yds -3% reduced damage taken.

Potion: Grants target ally an absorption shield, absorbing 50 + 35% Spirit damage, scaling with Spirit.

Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Fish Bones to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Fish Oil and Frog Bones.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Frog Bones.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Frog Bones.

Healing Ward.baseDescription: Drop a Healing Ward near you for 1 minute, healing 8 nearby allies within 30 yds for 48 + 20% SP + 12% ranged AP + 10% Spirit every 3 sec.

modifyingTalents.description: Dealing damage with Shadowflare now applies Hex of Malice if it strikes at least 3 enemies.Hex of MaliceCurse an enemy, dealing 5 + 8% shadow SP + 10% ranged AP Shadow damage and an additional 96 Shadow damage over 24 seconds.

Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

Periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice now has a 20% chance to collect a Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Damage dealt by Hex of Malice now has a 30% chance to summon a Serpent Ward on top of your enemy for 10 seconds to aid you in combat.

Can only occur once every 3 sec.

Hurl a bolt of dark magic at an enemy, dealing 203 + 87.65% SP + 100% Spirit Shadow damage, scaling with your Spirit.

If the target is affected by Hex of Malice it also reduces the target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds.
Increases the damage of Hex of Malice by 15% and the duration of Jinxes by 2 sec.
Increases the damage of Bad Juju, Malefic Wrath and Hexfire by 20% against enemies affected by Hex of Malice.
Each tick of Hex of Malice increases the damage of the next tick on the enemy by 3%, stacking 10 times.
Damage dealt by Bad Juju and Hexfire now spreads Hex of Malice to up to 1 nearby enemy.
Increases the duration of your Hex of Malice by 6 sec and the range of your offensive Voodoo spells by 6 yds.

Summoning your War Golem now increases your spell haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

In addition, periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice and damage dealt by Shadow Puppets will reduce the cooldown of War Golem by -0.5 sec.
Reduces the cost of your Loa's Brew and Hexbreak by -10%.
Your Hexbreak now removes an additional curse effect.

Hexfire.baseDescription: Blast an enemy with hexfire, dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPN), 60+0+SPFI*0.55, 60+0+SPN*0.55+SPI*0.5) Fire damage, scaling with your Spirit.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Bad Juju, Malefic Wrath and Hexfire by 20% against enemies affected by Hex of Malice.
Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Hexfire by 25%.
Damage dealt by Bad Juju and Hexfire now spreads Hex of Malice to up to 1 nearby enemy.
Damage dealt by Shadowflare and Hexfire now increases the chance enemies are critically struck by 3% for 12 seconds.

Hexfire now snaps your Puppeteer's Threads on your target, unleashing its damage on them instantly and collecting one Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Your Bad Juju and Hexfire now strike 2 additional nearby enemies.

Viper Wards have a 50% chance to unleash a Hexfire Blast, dealing 216 + 15% ranged AP Fire damage to an enemy.

Chance increased based on your ranged critical strike rating.

Hexplosion.baseDescription: Your offensive critical strikes now increase your haste by 20% for 6 seconds.

Reduces the cooldown of all Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -25%.

Can only have 1 Jinx active on a target at a time.

At the end of Shadow Avatar's duration you become a Lesser Shadow Avatar.Lesser Shadow AvatarIncreases magic damage dealt by 10% and reduces the cooldown of Spirit Glaive by 20% every 1 sec. Lasts for 8 seconds.
Your Lethargy Jinx now also reduces the target's periodic healing received by -30%.
Your Lethargy Jinx now increases your critical strike chance against the target by 10%.
Reduces the cast time of Loa's Brew by 0.25 sec.
Reduces the cost of your Loa's Brew and Hexbreak by -10%.
Effective healing done by Loa's Brew and Mojo Beam reduce the cooldown of Potion Toss and Splash Potion by -1 sec.

Level 30 Passive
Healing done by Loa's Brew now applies a random empowerment to the target ally.
When you heal with Loa's Brew your Effigies will now heal an additional ally within 20 yds for 35% of the healing done, prioritizing allies with low health.
Increases the bonus healing scaling of Loa's Brew and Spirit in a Bottle by 15%.

Potion Toss now applies Unstable Concoction to the target for 20 seconds. 

Using Loa's Brew or Spirit in a Bottle on the target will trigger an explosion of mojo around the target, healing nearby allies within 20 yds for 177 + 40% healing.
Summon a mimic ward for 12 seconds. For the duration when you cast Malefic Wrath and Loa's Brew the ward will also cast it on your target.
Casting Potion Toss and Spirit in a Bottle now reduce the cast time of your next 2 Loa's Brews by -20% for 10 seconds.

Loa's Strength.baseDescription: Increases your Agility and your Nature and Shadow damage dealt by 6%.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Malefic Arrow by -4 sec.
Increases the damage dealt by Malefic Arrow by 5% for each active Spirit on you.
While Shadowstalker or Mirage is active, every 1 sec you now gain a stack of Voodoo Hunger.Voodoo HungerIncreases the damage of your next Malefic Arrow by 10%, stacking 10 times. Lasts 8 seconds.
Damage dealt by Malefic Arrow now reduces the targets healing received by -20% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.
Each active Spirit gives you a 15% chance when you cast Malefic Arrow to generate an additional Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Your Malefic Arrow now deals an additional 15% of its damage dealt every 1 sec for 4 seconds as Nature damage.
Summon a mimic ward for 12 seconds. For the duration when you cast Malefic Wrath and Loa's Brew the ward will also cast it on your target.

Transforms your Malefic Wrath into Malefic Arrow.Malefic ArrowLaunch a voodoo arrow at an enemy, dealing 85% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 25 + 20% ranged AP + 25% nature SP as Nature damage, healing you equal to 40% of the damage dealt.
Reduces the cast time of Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju by -0.3 sec.
Increases the damage of Bad Juju, Malefic Wrath and Hexfire by 20% against enemies affected by Hex of Malice.

Transform into a malignant spirit for 30 seconds, allowing you to cast Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju while moving, and periodically granting you a Spirit every 2 sec.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Increases the spell power scaling of Malefic Wrath, Shadowflare, and Bad Juju by 20%.

Transforms Allcure Elixir into Mass Allcure Elixir.Mass Allcure ElixirRemoves all poison, disease and curse effects from party and raid members within 30 yds, and grants immunity to such effects for 3 seconds.
Your Mimic Ward will now summon 1 additional ward.
Your Mimic Ward now summons 1 additional Mimic Ward and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

While Mimic Ward is active, you now gain 15% increased ranged haste and your Reclamation transforms into Spirit Volley. 

Each Spirit now increases the damage of Spirit Volley by 3%.

In addition, direct ranged abilty damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Mimic Ward by -0.5 sec.
Increases the duration of Mimic Ward and Spirits by 8 sec.
Your Mimic Wards now also cast Bad Juju and casting Bad Juju now reduces the cooldown of Shadow Puppets by -3 sec.
Doubles the duration of Mirage.
Reduces the cooldown of Mirage by -60 sec.
While Shadowstalker or Mirage is active, every 1 sec you now gain a stack of Voodoo Hunger.Voodoo HungerIncreases the damage of your next Malefic Arrow by 10%, stacking 10 times. Lasts 8 seconds.
When your Shrinking Jinx is dispelled it now applies Misery to the dispeller.MiserySilences the target for 5 seconds and deals 9 + 60% shadow SP Shadow Damage every 1 sec for the duration.
Effective healing done by Loa's Brew and Mojo Beam reduce the cooldown of Potion Toss and Splash Potion by -1 sec.

Casting Spirit in a Bottle now grants Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

@ifknown:500950:In addition, channeling Mojo Beam causes Spirit in a Bottle to affect 3 additional allies near the primary target.:ifknown@

Level 40 Passive
Healing with Mojo Beam now heals up to 3 of the lowest health nearby allies within 20 yds for 75% of the healing done.

Level 50 Passive
Allows your Mojo Beam to critically heal.

Mojo Madness.baseDescription: Damage and healing done now have a 5% chance to reduce the cost of your next spell or ability by -100% for 10 seconds.

Potent Mixes.baseDescription: Increases your healing done by 4% and reduces the threat generated by your spells by -15%.

Your Bad Juju and Hexfire now strike 2 additional nearby enemies.

Shadowhunter.baseDescription:
Level 10 Passive
Allows you to auto shoot with a ranged weapon.

In addition, reduces the mana cost of all spells and abilities by -25%.

Shadowstalker.baseDescription: Disappear into darkness, entering an improved stealth mode, clearing all harmful effects, and increasing movement speed by 50% for 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: While Shadowstalker or Mirage is active, every 1 sec you now gain a stack of Voodoo Hunger.Voodoo HungerIncreases the damage of your next Malefic Arrow by 10%, stacking 10 times. Lasts 8 seconds.

Casting Spirit Eclipse with 5 Spirits now resets the cooldown of Spirit Glaive and causes your next cast within 8 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Spirit Glaives used in this way will reduce the cooldown of Shadowstalker by -15 sec.
When your Shrinking Jinx is dispelled it now applies Misery to the dispeller.MiserySilences the target for 5 seconds and deals 9 + 60% shadow SP Shadow Damage every 1 sec for the duration.

Slither.baseDescription:
Transform into a serpent, removing all movement impairing effects and increasing movement speed by 80% for 5 seconds.

You cannot attack or cast spells, but chance to be hit by ranged attacks and spells is reduced by -100% for the duration.

modifyingTalents.description:
Infuse your Cauldron with Spice: Earthbloom.

Increases effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients by 30%.

Casting Spirit in a Bottle now grants Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

@ifknown:500950:In addition, channeling Mojo Beam causes Spirit in a Bottle to affect 3 additional allies near the primary target.:ifknown@

Shoot a quick voodoo arrow at an enemy dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 15 as Nature damage and collecting a Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Usable while moving.

Unleash your Spirits on an enemy, dealing 8 + 7% ranged AP + 12% shadow SP Shadow damage every 0 sec for each active Spirit.

Each Spirit explodes on impact, dealing 71 + 6% shadow SP + 3.5% ranged AP Shadow damage to other nearby enemies within 5 yds of the target.

Level 20 Passive
For each active Spirit on you, you have an 5% chance for your Reclamation to cast an additional time.
Increases the damage dealt by Malefic Arrow by 5% for each active Spirit on you.
Collecting a Spirit now instantly restores 3% of your maximum mana.
Summoning a Serpent Ward or Spirit now increases the damage of your next Spirit Glaive or Spirit Eclipse by 6% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Each active Spirit gives you a 15% chance when you cast Malefic Arrow to generate an additional Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

Periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice now has a 20% chance to collect a Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Consumes your Spirits to increase your ranged critical strike rating by 10, critical damage by 5%, and causing you to heal for 2% of all damage dealt for each Spirit consumed.

In addition, you gain 1 Spirit every 1 sec while active.

Lasts for 3 sec per Spirit consumed.

While Mimic Ward is active, you now gain 15% increased ranged haste and your Reclamation transforms into Spirit Volley. 

Each Spirit now increases the damage of Spirit Volley by 3%.

In addition, direct ranged abilty damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Mimic Ward by -0.5 sec.
Summon a Shadow Puppet that collects a Spirit and rushes towards your target, dealing 25 + 22% shadow SP Shadow damage, repeating every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

Damage dealt and healing done now has a 15% chance to collect a Spirit.

In addition, each active Spirit now increases your Spirit by 4%.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Transform into a malignant spirit for 30 seconds, allowing you to cast Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju while moving, and periodically granting you a Spirit every 2 sec.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Shadow Puppets now ticks -10% faster and lasts 10% longer for each Spirit active on you.

Hexfire now snaps your Puppeteer's Threads on your target, unleashing its damage on them instantly and collecting one Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Level 40 Passive
Increases your spell critical damage by 100% and increases the critical strike chance of Bad Juju by 5% for each active Spirit on you.
Summoning a Serpent Ward or Spirit now increases the damage of your next Spirit Glaive or Spirit Eclipse by 6% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.
After using Spirit Eclipse, the damage of your next Shadowflare within 15 seconds is increased by 50%.
Your Spirit Eclipse now deals 40% increased damage when it explodes on impact.

Casting Spirit Eclipse with 5 Spirits now resets the cooldown of Spirit Glaive and causes your next cast within 8 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Spirit Glaives used in this way will reduce the cooldown of Shadowstalker by -15 sec.

Spirit Glaive.baseDescription:
Toss spectral glaives that strikes enemies it passes through, dealing 66 + 50% ranged AP + 50% shadow SP Shadow damage, and reducing their Shadow Resistance by 61 for 5 seconds.

Usable while moving.

modifyingTalents.description: While Shadow Avatar is active, the cooldown of Spirit Glaive is now reduced by 20% every 1 sec.
Summoning a Serpent Ward or Spirit now increases the damage of your next Spirit Glaive or Spirit Eclipse by 6% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Your Spirit Glaive now deals an additional 54 + 19% shadow SP + 14% ranged AP Shadow damage to up to 5 nearby enemies at the end of its duration.

At the end of Shadow Avatar's duration you become a Lesser Shadow Avatar.Lesser Shadow AvatarIncreases magic damage dealt by 10% and reduces the cooldown of Spirit Glaive by 20% every 1 sec. Lasts for 8 seconds.

Casting Spirit Eclipse with 5 Spirits now resets the cooldown of Spirit Glaive and causes your next cast within 8 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Spirit Glaives used in this way will reduce the cooldown of Shadowstalker by -15 sec.

Casting Spirit Eclipse with 5 Spirits now resets the cooldown of Spirit Glaive and causes your next cast within 8 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Spirit Glaives used in this way will reduce the cooldown of Shadowstalker by -15 sec.

Spirit Healer.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases healing power by 25% of Spirit and increases spell critical strike chance by 10% of Spirit.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Spirit In a Bottle causes the enemies to take 3% more damage and deal -3% less damage for 15 seconds.

Spirit Shock.baseDescription: Shock an enemy's spirit, silencing them for 4 seconds and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 4 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
While Mimic Ward is active, you now gain 15% increased ranged haste and your Reclamation transforms into Spirit Volley. 

Each Spirit now increases the damage of Spirit Volley by 3%.

In addition, direct ranged abilty damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Mimic Ward by -0.5 sec.

Casting Spirit in a Bottle now grants Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

@ifknown:500950:In addition, channeling Mojo Beam causes Spirit in a Bottle to affect 3 additional allies near the primary target.:ifknown@

Bring mojo to an ally, healing for 174 + 18.5% SP every 1 sec for 4 seconds. 

While channeling, you can instantly cast Potion Toss, Splash Potion and Spirit in a Bottle at a 20% increased cost.
Casting Potion Toss and Spirit in a Bottle now reduce the cast time of your next 2 Loa's Brews by -20% for 10 seconds.
Increases the bonus healing scaling of Loa's Brew and Spirit in a Bottle by 15%.

Potion Toss now applies Unstable Concoction to the target for 20 seconds. 

Using Loa's Brew or Spirit in a Bottle on the target will trigger an explosion of mojo around the target, healing nearby allies within 20 yds for 177 + 40% healing.
For 10 seconds, the effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients is increased by 100% and you can cast Spirit in a Bottle while moving.

Become invisible for 20 seconds, gaining 5 Spirits, leaving a copy of yourself behind, and reducing threat each second. Direct damage or healing done will end this effect.

While invisible, you can only see other invisible targets and those who can see invisible.

Unleash your Spirits on an enemy, dealing 8 + 7% ranged AP + 12% shadow SP Shadow damage every 0 sec for each active Spirit.

Each Spirit explodes on impact, dealing 71 + 6% shadow SP + 3.5% ranged AP Shadow damage to other nearby enemies within 5 yds of the target.

Increases the attack power of party and raid members by 5%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, health and mana restoration provided by your Spirits now occurs -50% more often.

Casting Spirit Eclipse with 5 Spirits now resets the cooldown of Spirit Glaive and causes your next cast within 8 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Spirit Glaives used in this way will reduce the cooldown of Shadowstalker by -15 sec.

Consumes your Spirits to increase your ranged critical strike rating by 10, critical damage by 5%, and causing you to heal for 2% of all damage dealt for each Spirit consumed.

In addition, you gain 1 Spirit every 1 sec while active.

Lasts for 3 sec per Spirit consumed.
Increases the duration of Mimic Ward and Spirits by 8 sec.

Spiritual Traditions.baseDescription: Allows 40% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting and reduces your spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 70%.

modifyingTalents.description: Effective healing done by Loa's Brew and Mojo Beam reduce the cooldown of Potion Toss and Splash Potion by -1 sec.

Bring mojo to an ally, healing for 174 + 18.5% SP every 1 sec for 4 seconds. 

While channeling, you can instantly cast Potion Toss, Splash Potion and Spirit in a Bottle at a 20% increased cost.

Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Fish Bones to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Fish Oil and Frog Bones.

Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Frog Shrooms to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Frog Bones.

Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Jungle Thistle to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Bloodthistle.
Jungle Shrooms when used with Potion Toss and Splash Potion now ticks -0.5 sec faster.

Staff of the Coven.baseDescription: Increases your Spirit by 25% and your hit chance by 6%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the duration of Stasis Ward's stun effect by 1 sec.

Stranglethorn Style.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 4% and reduces threat generated by your Voodoo spells by -20%.

Swift Idol.baseDescription:
Drop a Swift Idol near you for 10 seconds.

Allies within 30 yds gain 25% increased movement speed and their chance to resist movement impairing effects is increased by 25%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the duration and effectiveness of Vol'jin's Vigil and Swift Idol by 20%.

Veil of Darkness.baseDescription:
Envelop a target in a shadowy voodoo veil, increasing the damage you deal to them by 15% for 15 seconds.

If you are within 40 yds of the target you deal 195 + 10% shadow SP + 4.5% AP Shadow damage to them every 2 second.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage dealt by Veil of Darkness by 100%.

Transforms Call of Sseratus into Viper Ward.Viper WardSummons a powerful and fast-attacking Viper Ward at target location for 20 seconds.

Viper Wards have a 50% chance to unleash a Hexfire Blast, dealing 216 + 15% ranged AP Fire damage to an enemy.

Chance increased based on your ranged critical strike rating.

Voice of Bwonsamdi.baseDescription:
Let the spirit of Bwonsamdi possess you for 15 seconds.

Dealing periodic damage unleashes a trapped voodoo spirit at enemies, exploding for 162 + 25% shadow SP Shadow damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Voice of Bwonsamdi now increases your Spirit by 100%.

Vol'jin's Vigil.baseDescription: Embrace the way of Vol'jin, reducing your damage taken by -25% and healing you for 2% of your maximum health every 1 sec for 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the duration and effectiveness of Vol'jin's Vigil and Swift Idol by 20%.

Voodoo Cauldron.baseDescription:
Place down a Voodoo Cauldron for 15 seconds, increasing allies' healing received by 20% while near the cauldron.

Allies within 15 yds are healed for 300 + 60% healing every 1.5 sec for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the proc chance of Voodoo Fire by 10%.

Voodoo Power.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 50% of your Spirit and your spell hit rating by 5% of your Spirit.

War Golem.baseDescription: Summon a War Golem for 10 seconds, absorbing damage dealt to you based on your Intellect, and redirecting harmful spells cast on nearby allies to itself.

modifyingTalents.description:
Summoning your War Golem now increases your spell haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

In addition, periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice and damage dealt by Shadow Puppets will reduce the cooldown of War Golem by -0.5 sec.
Reduces the mana cost of your Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -20%.
Reduces the cooldown of all Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -25%.

Wizened.baseDescription: Increases your maximum mana by 10% and reduces the mana cost of spells and abilities by -6%.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cost of your Wujus by -50% and increases the effectiveness of Power Wuju by 20%.
